title: Noida、Uttar Pradesh — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Noida、Uttar Pradesh的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Noida是Uttar Pradesh的一个城市，人口约650,000。A planned satellite city of Delhi, a major IT and business hub with modern infrastructure, shopping malls, and residential complexes.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
